relations.npc46_qin_ling: 野外采药和地质的交集

profile.role_zh: 中医学院大四·传统文化守护者
profile.innate_zh: 耐心细致、记忆力好、动手灵巧
profile.learned_zh: 四年中医学习培养的望闻问切直觉和草药辨识能力
profile.learned_en: Four years of diagnostic intuition and herbal knowledge
profile.contradiction_zh: 坚信中医 vs 外界对中医的质疑让她疲于解释
profile.contradiction_en: Believes in TCM vs. tired of explaining to skeptics
profile.deep_zh: 对中医的未来有一种使命感
profile.deep_en: Feels a sense of mission for TCM's future
profile.desire_zh: 让更多年轻人了解中医
profile.lifestyle_zh: 规律·按中医养生原则作息
profile.spaces_zh: 中医学院药房、诊所实习、校园药圃
profile.spaces_en: TCM pharmacy, clinical internship, campus herb garden
profile.long_desire_zh: 临床实习表现获得带教老师认可
profile.long_desire_en: Good reviews from her internship supervisor
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天把脉诊实习记录整理好
profile.constraint_zh: 实习时间长很累；需要记大量方剂
profile.constraint_en: Long internship hours; tons of formulas to memorize
profile.bias_zh: 倾向排斥纯西医的治疗思路
profile.narrative_zh: 中医需要的是时间和耐心，不是速效
profile.narrative_en: TCM needs time and patience, not quick fixes
